sentence: 他小时候最喜欢扮成牛仔玩。
pinyin: Tā xiǎoshíhòu zuì xǐhuān bànchéng niúzǎi wán.
english: As a kid, he loved pretending to be a cowboy.

sentence: 这项科学研究花了五年时间。
pinyin: Zhè xiàng kēxué yánjiū huā le wǔ nián shíjiān.
english: This scientific research took five years to complete.

sentence: 这款手机是该品牌今年的旗舰产品。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn shǒujī shì gāi pǐnpái jīnnián de qíjiàn chǎnpǐn.
english: This phone is the brand's flagship product this year.
The hotel's decor is extremely luxurious.

sentence: 他说明了来意后，我们开始谈正事。
pinyin: Tā shuōmíng le láiyì hòu, wǒmen kāishǐ tán zhèngshì.
english: After he explained his purpose in coming, we got down to business.
